title: IR227 Seminars
text:
Welcome — this is where you’ll find each week’s seminar slides, worksheet, and the shared briefing document for your case group.
Each case briefing document is shared and editable by everyone at once — please add your group’s section rather than starting a new file.

title: IR227 Seminars
text:
Assignments
In-class assignment - This exercise builds the analytical skills the final examination rewards, and shows you how an exam question is structured before you sit the exam.

Open the assignment document
